message:
fix(kagenti): preserve replicas=0 to distinguish paused from absent (#7943) (#7947)

nestedInt64 returns 0 for both "field absent" (operator default) and
"field explicitly set to 0" (paused agent). The previous code forced
both to 1, hiding intentionally-paused agents as false "Degraded (0/1)"
entries in the UI.

Call unstructured.NestedInt64 directly and honor the found flag:
  - not found  -> default to 1 (operator default)
  - found, 0   -> keep 0 (paused)
  - found, > 0 -> keep the value

Fixes #7943

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
